description.value: The special forces unit tries to disrupt the enemy's ability to fight back by disarming their weapons, kicking dust in their eyes, and so on. Attempt an @Check[athletics|against:reflex] check against the Reflex DC of every enemy within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5]. On a success, that enemy takes a –2 circumstance penalty to attack rolls for 1 round, or if affecting a troop, a –2 circumstance penalty to that troop's DCs for damaging effects for 1 round. On a critical success, this penalty lasts for 2 rounds.
